Wayne, PA · Main Line · Chester County

Primary Care That Treats the Root Cause — Not Just the Symptom

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine. No insurance. No rushed appointments. Just your doctor, your time, and a plan built around your whole life.

Schedule a Free Meet & Greet See How Membership Works
✓ No insurance required ✓ Free meet & greet ✓ Board-certified Lifestyle Medicine
🏥
Dual Board-Certified Family & Lifestyle Medicine
🏅

Dual Board-Certified

Family Medicine + Lifestyle Medicine. Dr. Lieberman holds two board certifications — a combination virtually no other DPC practice on the Main Line can offer.

🍽️

Culinary & Nutrition-Trained

Real food knowledge, not generic advice. Dr. Lieberman earned degrees in culinary arts and nutrition science before medical school. When he talks about diet, he means it.

🤝

True DPC Model

No insurance. Flat monthly membership. Direct access to your doctor — by phone, text, or email. Same-day appointments. This is what primary care should have always been.

Why Forward Family Medicine

This Is What Primary Care Should Feel Like

The traditional model was never built around you. Ours is.

Feature Traditional Primary Care Forward Family Medicine
Average appointment time 7–10 minutes New patients: 2 hours | Follow-ups: 1 hour
Same-day access Rarely available Always available
Direct doctor contact No — through staff Yes — call, text, email
Lifestyle & nutrition coaching No Yes — board-certified
Monthly cost clarity Unpredictable copays & bills Flat monthly membership
Insurance required Yes No — membership only
Patient panel size 2,000+ patients per doctor ~250 patients per physician

Your Care Team

Meet the Doctors

Two board-certified physicians who left the insurance model to build something better — a practice where every patient gets the time, attention, and expertise they deserve.

Dr. David Bigley

DO — Family Medicine

Physician, Co-Founder

DOFamily MedicinePCOM

Whole-person osteopathic medicine — built on truly knowing his patients. Dr. Bigley left the insurance-based model to practice the way he always believed medicine should be: with time, trust, and genuine relationship.

Read full bio →

Dr. Philip Lieberman

MD — Family Medicine + Lifestyle Medicine

Physician, Co-Founder

MDFamily MedicineLifestyle MedicineU.S. Navy

Dual board-certified in Family Medicine and Lifestyle Medicine, with a culinary arts background that makes nutrition advice actually practical. The only physician of his kind on the Main Line.

Read full bio →

Ritamarie Smedile

PhD, RN

Clinical Operations & Wellness

PhDRNMaternal Health

A decade of maternal health, integrative wellness, and compassionate care in your community. Ritamarie supports clinic operations and patient services with deep clinical expertise.

Read full bio →
Read Full Bios →
What We Offer

Three Ways to Experience Forward Family Medicine

Every service starts with more time, more access, and a doctor who genuinely knows you.

🏥

Direct Primary Care

Flat monthly membership. No insurance. Unlimited visits, same-day access, and a doctor who actually knows you. Primary care the way it was always supposed to be.

Learn more →
🌿

Lifestyle Medicine

In-person, board-certified lifestyle medicine — integrated into every visit. Nutrition, movement, sleep, and stress treated as the medicine they are.

Learn more →
⭐

Concierge Medicine

Priority scheduling, extended visits, annual executive wellness exams, and enhanced specialist coordination. For patients who want the highest level of personalized care.

Learn more →
What Makes Us Unique

Most Doctors Tell You to Eat Better and Exercise More. We Show You How.

Lifestyle medicine is an evidence-based clinical specialty focused on preventing, treating, and reversing chronic disease through personalized changes in nutrition, movement, sleep, and stress. Dr. Lieberman isn't just familiar with this approach — he's board-certified in it, has developed formal training curricula for other physicians, and brings a background in culinary arts and nutrition science that makes the practical side of lifestyle change genuinely achievable.

At Forward Family Medicine, lifestyle medicine isn't a handout at checkout. It's built into how we practice.

🎓
Board-Certified American College of Lifestyle Medicine
🍴
Culinary Arts + Nutrition Science Pre-medical training in food and metabolism
📋
Built a Residency Curriculum Dr. Lieberman trained other physicians in Lifestyle Medicine
Learn About Our Lifestyle Medicine Approach →

The Only Practice on the Main Line With This

No other local DPC practice offers it at all. We offer it in person, integrated into every visit — included in your membership.

  • Personalized nutrition guidance from a culinary-trained physician
  • Evidence-based protocols for diabetes, hypertension & heart health
  • Physical activity planning that fits your real life
  • Sleep optimization and stress management
  • Ongoing accountability — not a one-time conversation
  • No extra fee — included in your DPC membership
Patient Stories

What Our Patients Say

"

I've never had a doctor pick up the phone personally when I called. Dr. Bigley does — every time. That alone is worth everything.

D.W. — Forward Family Medicine Patient
"

When I needed a specialist, they didn't just give me a name. They called ahead, explained my case, and made sure I got in quickly. I felt like I had someone fighting for me.

P.H. — Forward Family Medicine Patient
"

Dr. Lieberman didn't just tell me to lose weight — he built a real plan with me, based on what I actually eat and how I actually live. Three months later, my A1C is down significantly.

R.M. — Forward Family Medicine Patient
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

DPC is a membership model where you pay a flat monthly fee directly to your doctor — no insurance involved. You get unlimited primary care access, longer appointments, same-day availability, and a genuine care relationship. Think of it as your primary care doctor, always available, always on your side.

No. Direct Primary Care covers your day-to-day primary care needs. We recommend pairing it with a high-deductible health plan for hospital stays, surgeries, and specialist care.

We do not bill insurance. Our membership model is precisely what allows us to keep our patient panel capped at ~250 patients per physician and spend real time with each patient. No insurance means no compromises.

Lifestyle medicine is an evidence-based specialty using therapeutic changes in nutrition, activity, sleep, and stress to prevent, treat, and even reverse chronic disease. Dr. Lieberman is board-certified in it — and it's fully integrated into your membership. No extra fee.

In many cases, yes — especially following the Primary Care Enhancement Act (effective January 1, 2026), which clarified that HSA funds can be used for DPC memberships. Confirm eligibility with your plan administrator.

Schedule a free, no-obligation meet and greet. Come in, meet Dr. Bigley and Dr. Lieberman, see the office, and ask everything. No commitment required. Fill out the form on our contact page or call (215) 645-7044.

Ready for a Different Kind of Doctor?

Start with a free, no-obligation meet and greet. Meet the team, see the office, and ask every question you have. No pressure. No commitment.

Schedule My Free Meet & Greet

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
